nasb.text: They became very much afraid and said to one another, “Who then is this, that even the wind and the sea obey Him?”

esv.text: And they were filled with great fear and said to one another, “Who then is this, that even the wind and the sea obey him?”

cnv.text: 門徒非常懼怕，彼此說：“這到底是誰，連風和海都聽從他？”

ccb.text: 他们极其害怕，彼此议论说：“祂到底是谁？连风浪都听祂的！”

csbs.text: 门徒们就大为惊恐，彼此说：“这个人究竟是谁？连风和浪也听从他！”
